description.value:
Also starting at 3rd level, you have begun to develop certain protocols, reminiscent of your true purpose in the world, whether it be as an all-purpose combat unit, a scouting unit, or something else entirely. When you gain this feature, choose one of the following designations. When you do, you gain the following benefits, depending on your choice:

B (Battler):

  • You can alter your YoRHa weapon to take the form of a ranged weapon of your choice as an object interaction, decreasing its damage die by two steps and adding an additional damage die. When you do, you gain a +2 to attack rolls made with this weapon until the start of your next turn. In this form, any YoRHa Hijutsu you cast replace any melee attacks with ranged attacks. You can switch the weapon back to its original form as a free action.

  • Additionally, you may take an additional reaction a number of times equal to half of your proficiency bonus per long rest.

S (Scanner):

  • Your blindsight range is increased by 30 feet, and you cannot be surprised while you are conscious. Jutsu you cast with the Sensory keyword have their duration doubled, their cost reduced by 2, and have their ranges extended by 30 feet in every direction.

  • Additionally, creatures other than yourself gain a +1d4 bonus to attack and damage rolls against enemies in your blindsight range, up to a number of times per turn equal to half your proficiency bonus.
